## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (`./gradlew spotlessCheck` passes)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] Test coverage is maintained or improved (`./gradlew jacocoTestReport`)

## Database Changes

- [ ] No database changes
- [ ] Database migration added (`src/main/resources/db/migration/`)
- [ ] Migration tested locally

## API Changes

- [ ] No API changes
- [ ] API endpoints modified
- [ ] API documentation updated (OpenAPI annotations)

## Testing

Describe the tests you ran:

```
./gradlew test
```

Test results:
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Coverage maintained/improved

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your changes.
